title: Microsoft Sentinel Hunting Query
description: Schema for Sentinel-as-Code hunting queries deployed as Log Analytics Saved Searches.

id.description: Stable GUID used as the saved search resource name. Must not change after first deployment.

name.description: Display name shown in the Sentinel Hunting blade.

description.description: Plain-English explanation of what the query hunts for. Begins with 'Identifies' or 'Detects'.

query.description: KQL query returned directly to the analyst. Hunting queries have no scheduling or threshold.

tactics.description: MITRE ATT&CK tactic names (camelCase), stored as a tag on the saved search.

techniques.description: MITRE ATT&CK technique IDs, stored as a tag. Use 'techniques' (not 'relevantTechniques') for hunting queries.

tags.description: Additional key-value metadata pairs appended to the tactics/techniques tags at deploy time.
